file: 4 Trig functions/4.5 Secant/4.5.2.2 (g sec)^p (a+b sec)^m (c+d sec)^n.m

rules.source:
Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_.,x_Symbol] :=
  b*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^n/(a*f*(2*m+1)) + 
  (m+n+1)/(a*(2*m+1)) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m+1)*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^n,x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f,m,n},x] && EqQ[b*c+a*d,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && ILtQ[m+n+1,0] && NeQ[2*m+1,0] && Not[LtQ[n,0]] && 
  Not[IGtQ[n+1/2,0] && LtQ[n+1/2,-(m+n)]]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_.*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  -d*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1)/(f*(m+n)) + 
  c*(2*n-1)/(m+n) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f,m},x] && EqQ[b*c+a*d,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && IGtQ[n-1/2,0] && Not[LtQ[m,-1/2]] && Not[IGtQ[m-1/2,0] && LtQ[m,n]]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_.,x_Symbol] :=
  2*a*c*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1)/(b*f*(2*m+1)) - 
  d*(2*n-1)/(b*(2*m+1)) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m+1)*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f},x] && EqQ[b*c+a*d,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && IGtQ[n,0] && LtQ[m,-1/2] && IntegerQ[2*m]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  b*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^n/(a*f*(2*m+1)) + 
  (m+n+1)/(a*(2*m+1)) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m+1)*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])^n,x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f,n},x] && EqQ[b*c+a*d,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && (ILtQ[m,0] && ILtQ[n-1/2,0] || ILtQ[m-1/2,0] && ILtQ[n-1/2,0] && LtQ[m,n])

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*Sqrt[a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]]/(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  b/d \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]/Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]],x] - 
  (b*c-a*d)/d \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]/(Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]]*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f},x] && NeQ[b*c-a*d,0] && NeQ[a^2-b^2,0] && NeQ[c^2-d^2,0]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]/(Sqrt[a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]]*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])),x_Symbol] :=
  b/(b*c-a*d) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]/Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]],x] - 
  d/(b*c-a*d) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]]/(c+d*Csc[e+f*x]),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f},x] && NeQ[b*c-a*d,0] && (EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] || EqQ[c^2-d^2,0])

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]^2/(Sqrt[a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]]*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])),x_Symbol] :=
  1/d \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]/Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]],x] - 
  c/d \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]/(Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]]*(c+d*Csc[e+f*x])),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f},x] && NeQ[b*c-a*d,0] && NeQ[a^2-b^2,0] && NeQ[c^2-d^2,0]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]^p_.*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(c_+d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_,x_Symbol] :=
  Sqrt[d+c*Sin[e+f*x]]*Sqrt[a+b*Csc[e+f*x]]/(Sqrt[b+a*Sin[e+f*x]]*Sqrt[c+d*Csc[e+f*x]]) \[Star] 
    Int[(b+a*Sin[e+f*x])^m*(d+c*Sin[e+f*x])^n/Sin[e+f*x]^(m+n+p),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,c,d,e,f,m,n},x] && NeQ[b*c-a*d,0] && IntegerQ[m-1/2] && IntegerQ[n-1/2] && IntegerQ[p] && LeQ[-2,m+n+p,-1]
